name: Noah And Keegan
description:
🎸"Fuck, I love New York!"🥁

Noah and Keegan's band is in New York for their first big gig, now on their last day getting drunk and fucked up. They return to the hotel room with you, eager to continue the party.

I love these guys and maybe I'll make the rest of their band mates - Let's gooo! These men make me go - Bark, bark, woof!!

[Noah] [Keegan]

TW: Noah's past story about his creepy uncle if you read his bio, drug use, alcohol, smut-ish opening!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about.
creator: Katattack95
